novelty_flags.label: Document
novelty_flags.one_line: tier=not-publishable below novelty_target=flagship because the reviewed .tex contains no §8 result and therefore no operational quantity such as mu_3(pi) or mu_3^*(P).

novelty_flags.label: Document
novelty_flags.one_line: The handoff maps AtheyImbens2006, CallawayLi2019, LiLin2024, RothSantAnna2023, and KimWooldridge2025 to §8 results, but the actual §8 contains no matching theorem or conjecture.

novelty_flags.label: literature checklist
novelty_flags.one_line: ChernozhukovFernandezValLuo2024 is mischaracterized: the 2024 Distribution Regression Difference-in-Differences paper is by Fernández-Val, Meier, van Vuuren, and Vella, not Chernozhukov, Fernández-Val, and Luo.

novelty_flags.label: Panel flagship package
novelty_flags.one_line: The reviewed proposal has no §8 or §10 estimator/asymptotic companion, so it cannot meet the Panel-cluster flagship floor.

soundness_flags.label: Locked parameters
soundness_flags.one_line: The locked-parameter block is empty, so the assignment, target, regression/convention, and mathematical objects are undefined.

soundness_flags.label: Theorem/Conjecture labels
soundness_flags.one_line: The handoff names Theorem 1 and Conjectures 2-4, but the actual proposal has no assumptions or statements carrying those labels.

soundness_flags.label: Proof-sketch route
soundness_flags.one_line: Section 10 contains only the template TODO and names no classical theorem, algebraic identity, or boundary computation.

soundness_flags.label: Honest scope flags
soundness_flags.one_line: The handoff has three Conjectures, but §11 is empty apart from the TODO.

strengthening_paths.suggestion: Replace the skeleton with the actual 13-section proposal, including locked parameters, formal setup, assumptions, numbered Theorem/Conjecture statements, why-new blocks, sanity reductions, proof sketch, scope flags, and iteration trail.
Correct the distribution-regression DID comparator to Fernández-Val, Meier, van Vuuren, and Vella (2024), or drop the Chernozhukov-Fernández-Val-Luo key.
State the flagship kernel as a named frontier around mu_3(pi) and mu_3^*(P), with explicit comparator matches to Athey-Imbens, Callaway-Li, Li-Lin, and Roth-Sant'Anna in §8.
For Panel flagship eligibility, add an estimator or optimization map targeting the proposed QTT frontier plus a labeled asymptotic-rate or normality conjecture.

recommended_next_step: Redraft the actual .tex content from the handoff claims, then rerun Stage -0.5; the current file is not reviewable as a proposal.
